elements.text: You are taking a class that you enjoy. However, you were just informed that during the next class you will have to give a five-minute oral presentation to the rest of the class. On the evening before the presentation, you feel frightened about the idea of public speaking, and you decide your fear is...

elements.name: a_small_presentation--social_situations--puzzle1
elements.incorrect_feedback: Whoops! That doesn't look right. Please wait a moment and try again.
